name: Wangsu
description: Leading Chinese CDN (网宿科技) offering web acceleration, live streaming, security and edge compute worldwide.

seo.title: Wangsu — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Wangsu: Leading Chinese CDN (网宿科技) offering web acceleration, live streaming, security and edge compute worldwide.

when_to_use: Leading Chinese CDN for web acceleration and live streaming
Security and DDoS protection at Chinese network scale
Edge computing at Chinese ISP PoPs for low-latency apps
Video streaming CDN optimized for Chinese mobile networks
Global CDN with strong China-inland and cross-border performance

pros: Largest and most mature Chinese CDN
review.verdict: Default pick for serious China CDN workloads, enterprise process and thin DX make it less nice for small teams.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing premium Chinese CDN with ICP and global reach
review.not_for: Small startups that want self-serve signup and English-first developer UX
